attributes__keywords: Huawei, Smartphone, 4G LTE, 8 GB RAM, 256 GB Storage, 6.84 inches, HD+, EMUI 14.2
name: HUAWEI NOVA 15 Max 8G+256GB Lake Cyan
attributes__product_title: HUAWEI NOVA 15 Max 4G Smartphone, 8 GB RAM, 256 GB Storage, Lake Cyan, 6.84 inches
attributes__bullet_point_1: 6.84 inches HD+ display with 1272*2756 pixels resolution
attributes__bullet_point_3: 8 GB RAM and 256 GB internal storage
attributes__bullet_point_4: Rear camera 50 MP + 2 MP and front camera 8 MP
attributes__bullet_point_5: 8500 mAh typical battery capacity with Li-ion Polymer Battery
attributes__bullet_point_6: EMUI 14.2 operating system with IP65 water/dust resistance
attributes__product_description: The HUAWEI NOVA 15 Max smartphone features a large 6.84 inches HD+ display. It is powered by a Kirin 8000A processor and has 8 GB of RAM. The phone comes with 256 GB of internal storage. The rear camera has a 50 MP + 2 MP configuration, while the front camera is 8 MP. The phone has a typical battery capacity of 8500 mAh with a Li-ion Polymer Battery. It runs on the EMUI 14.2 operating system and has IP65 water/dust resistance. The phone supports 4G LTE, 3G WCDMA, and 2G GSM networks. It has dual SIM slots and supports OTG and Huawei Share. The phone also features X Key, HOTA online update, and more. The HUAWEI NOVA 15 Max is a powerful and feature-rich smartphone that is designed to meet the needs of modern users. With its large display, efficient processor, and high-quality cameras, it is an excellent choice for anyone looking for a reliable and versatile smartphone. The phone's IP65 water/dust resistance and long-lasting battery make it a great option for users who want a device that can keep up with their active lifestyle.
attributes__special_features: IP65 water/dust resistance, X Key, HOTA online update, OTG, Huawei Share
